---
title: "HW4"
author: "Massiel Payero Garcia"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(corrplot)
library(viridis)
```


```{r}
accident <- US_Accidents_March23_sampled_500k
accident
```


```{r}
# extract time variables
accident <- accident %>%
  mutate(
    Start_Hour = hour(Start_Time),
    Start_Month = month(Start_Time, label = TRUE),
    Start_Day = wday(Start_Time, label = TRUE),
    Start_Year = year(Start_Time)
  )
```


```{r}
# Table: Severity per Year
severity_time_table <- accident %>%
  filter(!is.na(Severity), !is.na(Start_Year)) %>%
  select(Start_Year, Severity) %>%
  table()

print(severity_time_table)
```


```{r}
# Mosaic plot
mosaicplot(severity_time_table,
           main = "Accident Severity by Year",
           xlab = "Year",
           ylab = "Severity Level",
           color = c("springgreen4", "gold2", "orange2", "tomato3"),
           cex.axis = 0.9,
           las = 1,
           border = "black")

```
```{r}
dim(severity_time_table)
dimnames(severity_time_table)
```


```{r}
# Increase right margin to make room for legend
old_par <- par(mar = c(5, 4, 4, 6))  # Increase right margin (last value)

colnames(severity_time_table) <- rep("", ncol(severity_time_table))

# Create mosaic plot
mosaicplot(severity_time_table,
           main = "Accident Severity by Year",
           xlab = "",  # Remove x-axis label
           ylab = "",  # Remove y-axis label
           color = c("springgreen4", "gold2", "orange2", "tomato3"),
           cex.axis = 0.9,
           las = 1,
           border = "black")

# Add legend outside the plot area
legend("right",
       legend = c("1", "2", "3", "4"),
       fill = c("springgreen4", "gold2", "orange2", "tomato3"),
       title = "Severity Level",
       cex = 0.8,
       bty = "n",
       inset = c(-0.14, 0),
       xpd = TRUE)

# Restore original margins
par(old_par)

```

```{r}
# Create mosaic plot
mosaicplot(severity_time_table,
           main = "Accident Severity by Year",
           xlab = "",
           ylab = "",
           color = c("springgreen4", "gold2", "orange2", "tomato3"),
           cex.axis = 0.9,
           las = 1,
           border = "black")

# Add legend in right margin
legend("topright",
       inset = c(-0.25, 0),
       legend = c("1", "2", "3", "4"),
       fill = c("springgreen4", "gold2", "orange2", "tomato3"),
       title = "Severity Level",
       bty = "n",
       xpd = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# Table: Percentage of Severity 4 accidents by state
severity4_by_state <- accident %>%
  filter(!is.na(State), !is.na(Severity)) %>%
  group_by(State) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Accidents = n(),
    Severity_4_Count = sum(Severity == 4),
    Severity_4_Percentage = (Severity_4_Count / Total_Accidents) * 100
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Severity_4_Percentage))


print(severity4_by_state,n=50)
mean(severity4_by_state$Severity_4_Percentage)
```

```{r}
statesmap = map_data('state')
head(statesmap)
```

```{r}
# statesmap plotted
ggplot(statesmap, aes(long, lat, group=group)) + 
  geom_polygon(colour='black', fill= NA)
```

```{r}
# state abbreviation to full name lookup table
state_lookup <- data.frame(
  State_Abbr = state.abb,
  State_Full = tolower(state.name)
)

# Add Washington DC (not in state.abb)
state_lookup <- rbind(state_lookup, data.frame(State_Abbr = "DC", State_Full = "district of columbia"))

# Join severity data with the lookup
severity4_with_fullnames <- severity4_by_state %>%
  left_join(state_lookup, by = c("State" = "State_Abbr")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(State_Full))  # remove states without matches

# join with map data
sev_map <- left_join(statesmap, severity4_with_fullnames,
                     by = c("region" = "State_Full"))
```


```{r}
# Plot map
ggplot(sev_map, 
       aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group, fill = Severity_4_Percentage)) +
  geom_polygon(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
  #coord_map("polyconic") + 
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    #option = "D", 
    direction = -1,
    name = "Severity 4\nAccidents (%)"
  ) +  
  labs(title = "Percentage of Severity 4 Accidents by State") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# South Dakota has 36.8% of accidents labelled as severity 4. This is the highest of any state.
# North Dakota has 0.42% of accidents labelled as severity 4. This is the lowest of any state.
# The average for all states is 5.05%.
```

```{r}
# Plot map
ggplot(sev_map, 
       aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group, fill = Severity_4_Percentage)) +
  geom_polygon(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
  #coord_map("polyconic") + 
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    #option = "D", 
    direction = -1,
    name = "Severity 4\nAccidents (%)"
  ) +  
  labs(title = "Percentage of Severity 4 Accidents by State") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),        # Remove axis labels
    axis.text = element_blank(),         # Remove axis text (numbers)
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),        # Remove axis ticks
    panel.grid = element_blank(),        # Remove all gridlines
    panel.background = element_blank()   # Optional: remove panel background
  )
```
